titleStmt.title: SII 19.163: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 163. (A.R. No. 436 of 1908.) TIRUVIḺIMIḺALAI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON A PILLAR IN THE SUNDARAKUCHĀMBĀḶ SHRINE, VIḶINĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE.

summary.p: Being built into the stone pavement, a few lines at the bottom of each side of the pillar are inaccessible. The inscription records an endowment in gold made by a certain chief or officer by name Amarabhujaṅgaṉ Muppuḷi alias Gaṇḍaruḷgaṇḍa-Pallavaraiyaṉ for the daily feeding at mid-day of 4 Brāhmaṇas in the temple of Tiruttāntōṉṟi-Mahādēva at Tirumaḻalai in Veṇṇāḍu. With this 120(1/4) kaḻañju, land was purchased for its yield in paddy to maintain this charity, the supervision of which passed after the demise of the donor to Amara-bhujaṅgaṉ Vāṇappēraiyaṉ alias Vāṉavaṉ Pallavaraiyaṉ, probably his son. The inscription is in early script and hence the record has been assigned to the reign of Vijayālaya (M.E.R. for 1909, Part II, para. 35).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti
śrī . ko
pparakecaripanmaṟkku
yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu veṇ
ṇāṭṭu tirumaḻalai tiruttā
ṉṟoṉṟi mahādevar śrī
koyilil Amarabhūjaṅka
ṉ muppuḷiyāṉa kaṇṭaruḷka
ṇṭap pallavaraiyaṉ ca
ntrādittavaṟ nālvar brā
hmaṇar nicatamum madhyāna
ttu perāl Irunāḻi A
riciyu muṉṟu kaṟiyum neyyum
Aṭṭuvaṉavum pākkum ve

ka nikkikkuṭu
tta poṉ
Ūrkkallā
l niṟai nūṟṟirupatiṉ kaḻa
ñcekāl Ippoṉ Ide
var tāme koṇṭaruḷi Āṭ
ṭaiviṭṭamum poṟkālaāl
Aḷakkakaṭava nellu nūṟṟiru
patiṉkalam Innellukku
ṭalākac ceyta nilam cenni
lattu pattu ceyyum pā
rkkuḷattiṉ kiḻaiccāḷam
nāṉmāvaraiyum kiḻppā
ṟai Idevar nilattu citārip
puṟattiṉ melpāṟ kiṭantā

ḻiyiṉmelai Araimāvu
māka nila mukkāle Ira
ṇṭumā Innilattāl
vanta Aṭaippaṭi nel
lu nikki niṉṟa nel(l)lu
Idevar paṇṭāratte Iva
ṉ vaicca Uttamāgrattukku
k kuṭuppatākavum Idevarka
nmikaḷome Ivvagram Orukā
l muṭṭilum keṅkai karai
Āyiraṅ kurālāka koṉṟa
[mahā]narakam pukuvatākavu

m Ivvagramuṇṇa Iṭṭa
kalam nālu niṟai nūṟṟiru
patu Ivvagram Aṭuviccu
Ūṭṭuvikkakkaṭavār śrīkoyi
ṉampu peṟṟār kaṇṭaruḷkaṇ
ṭap pallavaraiyaṉ kaḻi
ñcapiṉ Iddharmmam ceyvit
tār Amarabhūjaṅkaṉ puṇap
peraiyaṉāṉa vāṉavaṉ
pallavaraiyaṉ Iddharmmam I
vvūr sabhaiyum panmāhe
śvararum rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.163 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
